calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff's agent Michael Ware for Trustee Thomas F. Murphy is present.
Attorney, Lisa Padilla, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Gerard Cadorette is present.
Attorney, Tyler Macmillan, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed ON SEPT. 3, 2009. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 200 Guerrero St., #103, San Francisco, California.

The case is settled. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 is vacated upon return of executed stipulation.
